title: Product & Roadmap Sync — Q3 Planning

discussionLog.speaker: Priya Nair
discussionLog.text: Let's get started with the agenda: pricing tier decision, onboarding flow bug backlog, and Q3 roadmap slots.

discussionLog.speaker: Daniel Cho
discussionLog.text: The onboarding drop-off issue is actually at the workspace-naming step, not email verification.

discussionLog.speaker: Farah Siddiqui
discussionLog.text: The funnel breakdown shows a 31% drop between step two and step three, which is workspace naming.

discussionLog.speaker: Marta Ibanez
discussionLog.text: I think it's partly a copy problem and partly that there's no default suggestion for workspace naming.

discussionLog.speaker: Priya Nair
discussionLog.text: Let's prefill the workspace-naming field based on the user's email domain.

discussionLog.speaker: Owen Grant
discussionLog.text: Customers are asking for usage-based pricing, especially mid-market accounts.

discussionLog.speaker: Farah Siddiqui
discussionLog.text: The segment that wants usage-based pricing is about 15% of the base, but they're disproportionately our larger accounts.

discussionLog.speaker: Marta Ibanez
discussionLog.text: The pricing page design isn't ready for a third tier structure, that's a rebuild of the whole page.

discussionLog.speaker: Priya Nair
discussionLog.text: Let's put the usage-based pricing tier to a vote.

decisions.subject: Prefill workspace-naming field
decisions.fact: Prefill the workspace-naming field based on the user's email domain.
decisions.nextSteps: Daniel to implement the fix by Thursday.

decisions.subject: Usage-based pricing tier
decisions.fact: Commit to shipping the usage-based pricing tier in Q3.
decisions.nextSteps: Design and engineering to work on the implementation.

votes.question: Commit to shipping the usage-based pricing tier in Q3.

complianceFindings.title: Resourcing conflict
complianceFindings.description: Daniel raised a resourcing conflict between the Q3 usage-based pricing commitment and previously promised SSO delivery for two enterprise customers.

complianceFindings.title: Analytics migration timing
complianceFindings.description: The timing of the analytics migration is still undecided, which may impact headcount planning.

summary: The meeting discussed the onboarding flow bug backlog, pricing tier decision, and Q3 roadmap slots. The team decided to prefill the workspace-naming field and commit to shipping the usage-based pricing tier in Q3. However, there are resourcing conflicts and uncertainties around the analytics migration timing that need to be addressed.
